auth.routes
===========

.. py:module:: auth.routes

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   Authentication routes: registration, login, logout, and admin user creation.

   All routes in this module are registered on the 'auth' blueprint and are
   accessible under the /auth URL prefix.



Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   auth.routes.register
   auth.routes.login
   auth.routes.logout
   auth.routes.sys_admin_register


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: register()

   Handle student self-registration (GET and POST).

   GET:  Render the registration form.
   POST: Validate form data, hash the password, insert a new user row
         (role=3), a matching stud_type row, and an address row inside a
         single transaction. Redirect to login on success; flash an error
         if the email is already taken.


.. py:function:: login()

   Handle user login for all roles (GET and POST).

   GET:  Render the login form.
   POST: Look up the user by email, verify the bcrypt password hash, and
         populate the session with user_id, email, and role on success.
         Flash an error and re-render the form on failure.


.. py:function:: logout()

   Clear the session and redirect to the login page.


.. py:function:: sys_admin_register()

   Allow a system administrator to create a new user account (GET and POST).

   GET:  Render the admin user-creation form.
   POST: Validate the selected role (GS=1, Faculty=2, Student=3), hash the
         password, and insert the user. For student accounts, also insert a
         stud_type row. Always inserts an address row. Redirects to the user
         list on success; flashes errors for duplicate email or invalid role.

   Requires: system_admin role.
